description: CompositionBrown animal print kurta, made of blended sheer fabric, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, shimmery sequin work on the yoke, three quarter asymmetrical bell sleeves and a curved hemFitRegularWash careHand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleedFlat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironThe inspiration for this kurta from aneri is the retro-esque fusion of the uniquely ethnic with smart workwear. The modern Indian working woman has come into her own, as has her wardrobe. This piece epitomises how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create the perfect Indian tunic. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. For those who want to keep their look classic and chic, pair this with tonal leggings and embellished sandals. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
